summary: Spec 01 Phase 1 wrapper closes cleanly after spec-02 child phases (1.0-1.3) all DONE; all 5 RISK tiers finalized per Wyatt (1=medium, 2=high, 3=low, 4=medium, 5=high); GATE_FULL uses correct && syntax; test_ports.py refactor preserves semantics; ISSUE-011 (DrNick lore residue) honestly documented as non-blocking.

findings.description: ISSUE-011 logs DrNick milestone/feature/provider comment residue (M1..M7, FR2/FR4, DeepSeek/Together) in agent/*.py — non-blocking (comments only, DoD grep clean, ruff/mypy/pytest all pass). Cleanup deferred to Phase 2+ or dedicated pass.
